_comment: Canonical ReputationCommitment document shape. Per-verdict cryptographic commitment to the reputation_state scoreboard, written exclusively by the Auditor inside its verdict step (GDD §14.4 Artifact B). Forms the cross-chain spine: each commitment links to the previous via prev_root, producing a verifiable hash chain over the entire reputation history. A field mismatch here breaks falsifiable citation (GDD §7) and peer-auditor replay (GDD §14.7).
_consumers: g8ee (Auditor — writes one commitment per passing verdict; reads prev_root from latest commitment)
g8ee (peer auditor replay — recomputes Merkle root over historical reputation_state to verify)

reputation_commitment._description: Auditor-signed Merkle commitment binding a tribunal verdict to the reputation scoreboard at verdict time. Append-only; commitments are never revised. Genesis commitment uses the deployment-scoped sentinel prev_root '0' * 64.

investigation_id.description: Investigation that produced this verdict. Binds the commitment to a specific chain (block producer).

tribunal_command_id.description: TribunalCommand whose auditor verdict triggered this commitment. The block being committed.

merkle_root.description: SHA-256 hex (64 chars) Merkle root over the sorted (agent_id, scalar) leaves of reputation_state at verdict time. Recomputable by any party with a snapshot of reputation_state.

prev_root.description: merkle_root of the previous commitment in the deployment, or sentinel ('0' * 64) for the genesis commitment. Forms the cross-chain spine.

leaves_count.description: Number of (agent_id, scalar) leaves included in the Merkle tree. Equals the number of reputation_state rows at commit time.

signed_by.description: Identity of the signer. Day 1: always literal 'auditor'. Future: persona id of the specific auditor instance.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex (64 chars) over canonical_input = `merkle_root || prev_root || tribunal_command_id` using the auditor's HMAC key. Day-1 key custody: g8eo SecretManager (see GDD §14.10 resolved decisions).

created_at.description: When the commitment was written (UTC, ISO 8601 with Z suffix).
